name: cairn-ai
description: Token-efficient agent harness with tool readiness for Codex, Claude Code, and Antigravity

scripts.check: node --check scripts/cairn.mjs && node --check scripts/cairn-state.mjs && node --check scripts/cairn-lifecycle.mjs && node --check scripts/cairn-toolcheck.mjs && node -e "JSON.parse(require('node:fs').readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); JSON.parse(require('node:fs').readFileSync('.codex-plugin/plugin.json','utf8')); JSON.parse(require('node:fs').readFileSync('hooks/hooks.json','utf8'))" && npm test
